vision.rationale: README.md provides the project tagline, vision ('agent-native, dark, opinionated dev workspace'), BruceOS relationship, and pane overview. CLAUDE.md provides roadmap items and the broader ecosystem context (BruceOS, Megasupersoft Ltd).

architecture.rationale: CLAUDE.md contains comprehensive architecture documentation: six-pane model with always-mounted pattern, complete IPC channel table, Zustand state shape, library gotchas, and the GhostedDB system. The source structure (src/panes/, electron/, src/store/) directly reflects this documented architecture.

principles_guidelines.rationale: CLAUDE.md contains a detailed 'MANDATORY WORKFLOW — DO NOT SKIP' section with explicit principles: session start protocol, doc-first coding, /brief → /arch → code flow, review requirements, automatic checks for panes/IPC/terminals/native deps. Design principles (dark theme, accent color) are in README.md and src/styles/global.css.
